name: trickle-pixelate
title: Pixelate
author: trickle contributors
description: Resolves text characters from a blurred pixelated state in deterministic order.

changes: Changed the cn import from @/lib/cn to ../../lib/cn so the copied support file resolves source-locally and after installation.
Added a local render-component type bridge for React 19 polymorphic JSX without changing runtime behavior.

modifications.change: Changed the cn import from @/lib/cn to ../../lib/cn. Added a local render-component type bridge for React 19 polymorphic JSX without changing runtime behavior.
modifications.reason: Resolve the copied upstream helper from both the source batch and its registry install targets without relying on the upstream site alias. Keep the original polymorphic API while compiling the upstream React 18-era generic JSX against React 19 types.
